responsibilities: Forecast daily, weekly, and monthly cash flow positions to ensure adequate liquidity for operational and strategic needs
Manage short-term investment portfolios and money market instruments to optimize yield on excess corporate cash balances
Analyze foreign exchange exposure and execute hedging strategies using forwards and swaps to mitigate currency risk
Monitor and report on debt covenants, credit facilities, and interest rate exposure across the company's capital structure
Prepare treasury reports and liquidity dashboards for senior management summarizing cash position and funding risk
Coordinate with banking partners to manage credit lines, letters of credit, and corporate banking relationships
Support debt issuance and refinancing activities including credit rating agency presentations and lender negotiations
Conduct interest rate risk analysis and recommend hedging instruments to manage exposure on variable-rate debt
